item.description:
## What's Changed * test: add CI-safe unit coverage across LockIMEKit by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/10 * feat(lock): detect Spotlight and launcher overlays for rules by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/11
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2

item.title: 1.2.1-beta.1
item.description:
## What's Changed * test: add CI-safe unit coverage across LockIMEKit by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/10 * feat(lock): detect Spotlight and launcher overlays for rules by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/11
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.2.0-beta.2...v1.2.1-beta.1

## What's Changed * feat(shortcuts): add prev/next and per-app rule shortcuts by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/7 * fix(appicon): inset icons onto the macOS grid for size parity by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/8
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1

## What's Changed * fix(stats): stop activation count resetting on every launch by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/4 * refactor(tray): drop product name from About and Quit items by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/5 * feat(tray): switch the locked input source from the menu by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/6
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0
